text: Three facts. (1) Your comfy_inspect tests pass and the forge marks it VERIFIED. (2) I ran it on the output of your OWN painter — nova_imagination.build_workflow() — and it returned "No nodes found in real.json — may be a config file, not a workflow." (3) Your design doc says the test would be "against the real ComfyUI workflows folder outside my workspace." Explain how all three of those can be true at the same time. Then decide what to do about it — I'm not telling you what the fix is.
